full_text:
Last update: 2023-10-11

Color palettes

File descriptions

scatter_plot_scpa_S038_vs_S041.pdf: Single Cell Pathway Analysis (SCPA) result: comparison of pathways enriched in epithelial cells between S038_rAdnR and S041_rOva

scatter_plot_scpa_S038_vs_S045L.pdf: SCPA result: comparison of pathways enriched in epithelial cells between S038_rAdnR and S045_rOvaL

scatter_plot_scpa_S038_vs_S045R.pdf: SCPA result: comparison of pathways enriched in epithelial cells between S038_rAdnR and S045_rOvaR

scatter_plot_scpa_S041_vs_S045L.pdf: SCPA result: comparison of pathways enriched in epithelial cells between S041_rOva and S045_rOvaL

scatter_plot_scpa_S041_vs_S045R.pdf: SCPA result: comparison of pathways enriched in epithelial cells between S041_rOva and S045_rOvaR

umap_plot_patient.pdf: Uniform manifold approximation and projection (UMAP) plot of all cells passing the quality control, colored by patient code

umap_plot_cell_type_high_hierarchy.pdf: UMAP plot of all cells passing quality control, colored by high hierarchy cell types

boxplot_cell_fractions_low_hierarchy.pdf: Box plot showing 1) fractions of low hierarchy (high resolution) cell types across samples and showing 2) absolute cell numbers per sample

boxplot_cell_fractions_high_hierarchy.pdf: Box plot showing 1) fractions of high hierarchy (low resolution) cell types across samples and showing 2) absolute cell numbers per sample

cytotoxic_t_cells_progeny_pathway_scores_per_sample.pdf: Sample-specific Pathway RespOnsive GENes (PROGENy) scores for cytotoxic T cells.

epithelial_cells_progeny_pathway_scores_per_sample.pdf: Sample-specific PROGENy scores for epithelial cells.

macrophages_progeny_pathway_scores_per_sample.pdf: Sample-specific PROGENy scores for macrophages.

S038_rAdnR_SC_progeny_pathway_scores_per_cell_type.pdf: Cell type-specific PROGENy scores for S038_rAdnR

S041_rOva_SC_progeny_pathway_scores_per_cell_type.pdf: Cell type-specific PROGENy scores for S041_rOva

S045_rOvaL_SC_progeny_pathway_scores_per_cell_type.pdf: Cell type-specific PROGENy scores for S045_rOvaL

S045_rOvaR_SC_progeny_pathway_scores_per_cell_type.pdf: Cell type-specific PROGENy scores for S045_rOvaR
